stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Chourio pinch-hit · Pop Out
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio pops out to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Barrosa pinch-hit · Sac Bunt
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Barrosa hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by third baseman Tommy Edman. Nolan Arenado to 3rd. Jorge Barrosa to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Joey Bart strikes out swinging.
